chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 254 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1209/2025 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.2, which is taken on record, whereas, Counsel for the petitioner submits that the Petitioner filed an application for early retirement but the respondents are not deciding the same. He submits that similar order was already passed by this Court on 07.09.2021 in C.P No.D-1232/2021, therefore, prays that such order may be passed in the present Petition. Counsel for respondent No.2 submits that the petitioner may be directed to file a fresh application, which shall be decided in accordance with the law by the Respondents-Department. Accordingly, in view of the above the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to the petitioner to file a fresh application to Respondent No.2, which shall be decided by the Respondents-Department preferably within a period of 30 (thirty) days from today in accordance with the prevailing law and Circular of the Finance Department as noted above. Judge Judge ARBROHI
